## How To Test

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] If Prisma schema changed: `npx prisma generate`
- [ ] If API routes changed: verify affected endpoint(s)
- [ ] If worker/queue changed: verify publish/consume flow

## Maintenance Matrix Checks

- [ ] Updated related files per `.github/copilot-instructions.md` maintenance matrix
- [ ] Updated docs/config/scripts when changing runtime entrypoints
- [ ] Kept secrets out of committed config files
